skills.name: CRS Sanity Check
skills.description: Validate coordinate systems, units, and reprojection assumptions before analysis.

skills.name: Data Source Intake
skills.description: Standard intake checklist for evaluating geospatial data sources before use.

skills.name: Geospatial Triage
skills.description: Rapidly scope a geospatial request, validate data assumptions, and propose an execution plan.

skills.name: Layer QC
skills.description: Run quality checks on vector or raster layers before downstream workflows.

skills.name: QGIS Processing
skills.description: Use Arion's local QGIS integration to discover, describe, and run qgis_process workflows against file-backed layers.
